title: Bug report mode: Capture developer context in Loom Chrome extension
description:
People using Loom with AI enabled can now record videos in bug report mode from the Chrome extension. Bug report mode automatically includes device information, console logs, and network logs to help teams resolve issues faster. To get started with this change: Make sure you are signed in to Loom with AI enabled.
	Install or update the Loom Chrome extension.
	Open the extension and select Bug Report from the menu.
	Record your video in bug report mode.
